case_title: SUSANNA SHAW VS. ALLIED MEDICAL SERVICES OF CALIFORNIA INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLIED MEDICAL SERVICES OF CALIFORNIA INC. DBA KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE COMPANY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $495.00 FILED BY SHAW, SUSANNA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIED MEDICAL SERVICES OF CALIFORNIA INC. DBA KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
